description: ⚠️ DEPRECATED — Replaced by agency-enforcer@1.0.0. This contract is kept for backward compatibility until 2026-08-11.

replacedBy.integration: Use enforcer.js post/commit/handoff commands instead of post-task-gate.js

migrationNote: All functionality has been folded into .agency/scripts/enforcer.js. The post-task-gate.js script will delegate to enforcer.js until removed.
